title: bidens micrantha subsp. ctenophylla
intro: Bidens micrantha subsp. ctenophylla, also known as small beggarticks, is a subspecies of the Bidens micrantha plant, a type of flowering plant in the aster family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens micrantha subsp. ctenophylla include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving the use of the plant's leaves and stems.
